open_prs.title: [Repo Assist] feat: add l_strtod, l_atof, and %f/%e/%g in l_snprintf
[Repo Assist] feat: add l_getpid, l_getppid, l_kill, l_llabs + signal constants
[Repo Assist] fix: l_qsort stack buffer overflow for elements > 256 bytes
[Repo Assist] perf: word-at-a-time l_strcpy; l_strcat reuses l_strlen

notes: No human-authored issues. Four open Repo Assist PRs: #80 (strtod/float-fmt), #79 (getpid/kill/llabs), qsort-overflow fix, strcpy-perf. Next candidates: l_printf direct fd write with format (convenience), l_strtof (float32), or buffered I/O helpers.
